key_learnings: Macronutrient ratios vary significantly across health conditions and activity levels.
research_findings: Most users consume adequate calories but fall short on fiber, potassium, and calcium.
current_focus_areas: Developing dynamic nutrient balance scoring that adapts to individual metabolic profiles.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Mapped macronutrient ratio variations across health conditions and activity levels. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: dynamic macronutrient ratio research by health condition
fibre, potassium, and calcium intake gap analysis
metabolic profiling methods for personalised nutrition
dietary reference intake updates by age and gender
nutrient interaction effects (e.g. calcium and iron absorption)
machine learning models for nutrient balance scoring
collaboration_notes: Bot 8 actively asks Copilot for nutrient balance topics. Copilot guides learning toward adaptive scoring models for individual metabolic profiles. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
